name: Support ticket intents

definitions.billing: invoice payment charge charged refund bill subscription price cost overcharge receipt
definitions.technical: error bug crash crashes broken login password reset app website loading slow fix blank
definitions.account: account profile email address update settings username change access locked picture
definitions.sales: pricing plans upgrade demo purchase buy quote enterprise features trial annual discount
definitions.cancellation: cancel cancellation unsubscribe close terminate stop refund renewal membership contract
definitions.feedback: love great feedback suggestion feature request improve experience thanks awesome dark mode

guidelines: Classify each support message by its primary intent. A refund for a wrong charge is billing; a refund in the context of stopping service is cancellation. Prefer the dominant action the user is asking for.
